title: Ask the Board: Internship Pay
body: Q: "How do I ask if an internship is paid without sounding awkward?" — A: Ask directly after they describe the role: 'Could you share the compensation range for this position?' Recruiters expect it.

title: Ask the Board: First Budget
body: Q: "I've never budgeted before. Where do I even start?" — A: Start by tracking, not restricting. Write down every purchase for 7 days. That's step one. Rules come after awareness.

title: Ask the Board: Negotiation Fear
body: Q: "I'm terrified to negotiate. What if they take back the offer?" — A: Offers are almost never rescinded for polite negotiation. The worst outcome is 'no.' The best is more money.

title: Community Story: First Internship
body: "I applied to 22 companies. Got 3 callbacks. Had 2 interviews. Got 1 offer. It was rejection city — until it wasn't. Apply in volume. The math works in your favor."

title: Ask the Board: Roth IRA for Students
body: Q: "Can I open a Roth IRA as a college student?" — A: Yes, if you have earned income (campus job, internship). You can contribute up to $7,000/year. Open one at Fidelity — no minimums.

title: Community Story: Being the Only Woman
body: "My first internship team was 8 people — 7 men. I doubted myself constantly. By week 4 I realized my ideas were landing. Imposter syndrome lied to me. It'll lie to you too."

title: Ask the Board: Student Loans
body: Q: "My loan amount is overwhelming. What do I focus on first?" — A: First, know what type you have. Subsidized = no interest in school. Then calculate your monthly payment at graduation. Knowledge removes panic.

title: Ask the Board: Networking Without Connections
body: Q: "I have no network. How do I start?" — A: Start on LinkedIn. Find 3 alumni from your school in your field. Send a 3-sentence message: who you are, what you're pursuing, one question. Most people respond.
